name: craft-statusline
description: A carefully crafted Claude Code statusline written in bash. Shows model, effort level, git branch (state-aware color palette), context window with absolute-token traffic light, rate limits, optional cost, and a hook-free activity indicator.

show_model.title: Show model + effort
show_model.description: Display the active model and effort level (e.g. Sonnet 4.6▸normal).

show_branch.title: Show git branch badge
show_branch.description: Display the colored git branch badge with state-aware palette.

show_context.title: Show context usage
show_context.description: Display the context window usage with traffic light coloring (green / yellow / red).

show_context_alert.title: Show context warning symbol
show_context_alert.description: Append the ⚠ symbol when the context enters the yellow or red zone.

show_rate_limits.title: Show 5h / 7d rate limits
show_rate_limits.description: Display the rolling 5-hour and 7-day rate limit usage.

show_cost.title: Show session cost
show_cost.description: Display session cost in USD. API billing only — meaningless on flat-rate plans (Pro/Team/Max). Off by default.

show_activity.title: Show activity indicator
show_activity.description: Display the hook-free indicator that shows whether Claude is thinking, executing a tool, or researching via a subagent.

show_color.title: Use ANSI color
show_color.description: Apply ANSI color codes. Disable for monochrome terminals or capture pipelines.

context_alert_at.title: Context red threshold (percent)
context_alert_at.description: Percentage of the context window at which the badge turns red and a ⚠ is shown. Auto-compact is usually imminent.

context_degrade_at_tokens.title: Context yellow threshold (absolute tokens)
context_degrade_at_tokens.description: Absolute token count at which the badge turns yellow. Reflects the zone where model recall measurably degrades on large-window models.

activity_live_window_secs.title: Activity stale window (seconds)
activity_live_window_secs.description: Transcript mtime younger than this counts as active. Older means idle, indicator disappears. Default 60s covers most long tool calls without lingering after a turn ends.
